action.description:
Introduced by Senators Pfaff, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Ratcliff, Wall, Keyeski, Roys, Spreitzer, Hesselbein, Carpenter, Habush Sinykin, Wirch and Larson; 
cosponsored by Representatives DeSanto, J.
